title: sideritis cretica var. stricta
intro: Sideritis cretica var. stricta, also known as Greek mountain tea or strict Cretan ironwort, is a plant species native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sideritis cretica var. stricta include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Sideritis cretica var. stricta is typically consumed as a herbal tea or used in tincture form, with some reports of its use in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
